sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import '../styles/About.css'; const About = () => { const teamMembers = [ { name: 'Sarah Johnson', role: 'Conservation Director', image: '/person1.jpg', bio: 'With over 15 years of experience in wildlife conservation, Sarah leads our strategic initiatives and has successfully implemented numerous conservation projects across Africa.' }, { name: 'David Mwangi', role: 'Field Operations Manager', image: '/person2.jpg', bio: 'David coordinates our on-ground conservation efforts and community engagement programs, bringing 12 years of expertise in wildlife protection and community development.' }, { name: 'Emma Chen', role: 'Research Coordinator', image: '/person3.jpg', bio: 'Emma oversees our research programs and partnerships with academic institutions, specializing in wildlife behavior and habitat preservation techniques.' } ]; const impactStats = [ { number: '500+', label: 'Wildlife Protected', description: 'Endangered species under our direct conservation programs and monitoring' }, { number: '1000+', label: 'Community Members', description: 'Local community members trained and empowered through our initiatives' }, { number: '25+', label: 'Conservation Projects', description: 'Active conservation and research projects across different African regions' }, { number: '10,000+', label: 'Hectares Preserved', description: 'Natural habitat protected and restored through our conservation efforts' } ]; return (

Protecting Africa's Wildlife Legacy

Dedicated to preserving Africa's diverse wildlife through innovative conservation, education, and sustainable community engagement

Our Mission

At CareAfrica, we envision a world where wildlife and humans thrive together in harmony. Our mission is to protect and preserve Africa's precious wildlife through cutting-edge conservation approaches, community empowerment, and sustainable practices that benefit both nature and people.

Protection

Implementing innovative conservation strategies and advanced monitoring systems to protect endangered species and their habitats

Community

Empowering local communities through education, training, and sustainable development initiatives that promote conservation

Sustainability

Developing and implementing sustainable practices that ensure long-term benefits for both wildlife and human communities

Our Impact

{impactStats.map((stat, index) => (

{stat.number}

{stat.label}

{stat.description}

))}

Our Team

{teamMembers.map((member, index) => (

{member.name}

{member.role}

{member.bio}

))}

Join Our Conservation Mission

Together, we can make a lasting impact in protecting Africa's wildlife heritage for future generations. Your support can help us expand our conservation efforts and create positive change.

Make a Donation Join as Volunteer
); }; export default About;
